mapper.select:
select d.data_id, d.contract, d.gym_id, d.sender_id, d.receiver_id, d.receiver_name, d.status, d.previous_data_id, d.related_data_id, d.source_coupon_id, d.start_date, d.end_date, d.amount, d.contract_rate, d.quantity, d.remaining_count, d.issue_date, d.signed_at, d.manager_id, d.birth_date, d.avg_workout_hour, d.avg_workout_minute, m.username as m_username, m.name as m_name, m.email as m_email, m.role as m_role, m.gym_id as m_gym_id from "h_contract_data" d left join "h_member" m on d.receiver_id = m.username
and d.contract = 1
and ( (d.sender_id = #{username} and d.contract in (2, 3, 4, 5)) or (d.contract = 1 and d.receiver_id = #{username}) )
and ( (d.contract in (4, 5) and d.manager_id = #{username}) or (d.contract = 2 and d.receiver_id = #{username}) )
and 1 = 0
and d.contract = #{contract}
and (m.name like concat('%', #{keyword}, '%') or cast(m.username as varchar) like concat('%', #{keyword}, '%') or d.receiver_name like concat('%', #{keyword}, '%'))
order by d.issue_date desc, d.data_id desc

select d.data_id, d.contract, d.gym_id, d.sender_id, d.receiver_id, d.receiver_name, d.status, d.previous_data_id, d.related_data_id, d.source_coupon_id, d.start_date, d.end_date, d.amount, d.contract_rate, d.quantity, d.remaining_count, d.issue_date, d.signed_at, d.manager_id, d.birth_date, d.avg_workout_hour, d.avg_workout_minute, g.gym_name as j_gym_name, m.username as m_username, m.name as m_name, m.email as m_email, m.role as m_role, m.gym_id as m_gym_id from "h_contract_data" d left join "h_gym" g on d.gym_id = g.gym_id left join "h_member" m on d.receiver_id = m.username where d.data_id = #{dataId}
mapper.update: update "h_contract_data" set status = 'SIGNED', signed_at = now() where data_id = #{dataId} and status = 'ISSUED'
update "h_contract_data" set status = 'TERMINATED' where end_date is not null and end_date < current_date and status in ('ISSUED', 'SIGNED', 'ACTIVE')

update "h_contract_data" d set status = 'ACTIVE', remaining_count = (case when d.contract in (4, 5) then d.quantity else d.remaining_count end) where d.status = 'SIGNED' and d.start_date is not null and d.start_date <= current_date and (d.contract in (1, 2) or (d.contract in (3, 4, 5) and exists (select 1 from "h_pay" p where p.data_id = d.data_id)))
update "h_contract_data" set status = 'ACTIVE', remaining_count = (case when contract in (4, 5) then quantity else remaining_count end) where data_id = #{dataId} and status = 'SIGNED'
mapper.select: select c.coupon_id, c.coupon_num, ct.coupon_name, ct.coupon_count, c.date as coupon_expire, m.username as m_username, m.name as m_name, m.email as m_email, m.role as m_role, m.gym_id as m_gym_id, m.birth as m_birth, b.data_id as base_data_id, b.contract as base_contract, (case when b.contract = 4 then b.manager_id else null end) as base_manager_id from "h_coupon_type" ct join "h_coupon" c on c.coupon_num = ct.coupon_num join "h_member" m on c.to_id = m.username left join lateral ( select d.data_id, d.contract, d.manager_id from "h_contract_data" d where d.receiver_id = m.username and d.contract in (3, 4) and d.status in ('SIGNED', 'ACTIVE') and (d.end_date is null or d.end_date >= current_date) order by d.data_id desc limit 1 ) b on true where ct.category = '체험권' and ct.gym_id = #{gymId} and c.from_id = #{username} and c.status = '미사용' and (c.date is null or c.date >= current_date) and upper(m.role) = 'MEMBER' and m.gym_id = #{gymId} order by c.coupon_id desc

select d.data_id, d.contract, d.gym_id, d.sender_id, d.receiver_id, d.receiver_name, d.status, d.manager_id, d.start_date, d.end_date from "h_contract_data" d where d.contract in (3, 4) and d.receiver_id = #{receiverId} and d.status in ('SIGNED', 'ACTIVE') order by d.data_id desc limit 1

select d.data_id, d.contract, d.gym_id, d.sender_id, d.receiver_id, d.receiver_name, d.status, d.previous_data_id, d.related_data_id, d.source_coupon_id, d.start_date, d.end_date, d.amount, d.contract_rate, d.quantity, d.remaining_count, d.issue_date, d.signed_at, d.manager_id, d.birth_date, d.avg_workout_hour, d.avg_workout_minute from "h_contract_data" d where d.contract = 2 and d.sender_id = #{senderId} and d.receiver_id = #{receiverId} order by d.data_id desc limit 1
mapper.update: update "h_contract_data" set gym_id = #{gymId, jdbcType=BIGINT}, receiver_name = #{receiverName}, amount = #{amount, jdbcType=BIGINT}, contract_rate = #{contractRate, jdbcType=NUMERIC}, start_date = #{startDate, jdbcType=DATE}, end_date = #{endDate, jdbcType=DATE}, status = 'ISSUED', signed_at = null, issue_date = current_date where data_id = #{dataId}
mapper.select: select m.username, m.name from "h_member" m left join lateral ( select c.status from "h_contract_data" c where c.contract = 2 and c.receiver_id = m.username order by c.data_id desc limit 1 ) w on true where upper(m.role) = 'TRAINER' and (w.status is null or w.status = 'TERMINATED') order by m.username asc

select d.data_id, d.contract, d.gym_id, d.sender_id, d.receiver_id, d.receiver_name, d.status, d.previous_data_id, d.related_data_id, d.source_coupon_id, d.start_date, d.end_date, d.issue_date, g.gym_name as j_gym_name, m.username as m_username, m.name as m_name, m.email as m_email, m.role as m_role, m.gym_id as m_gym_id from ( select distinct on (gym_id) * from "h_contract_data" where contract = 1 order by gym_id, data_id desc ) d left join "h_gym" g on d.gym_id = g.gym_id left join "h_member" m on d.receiver_id = m.username order by d.end_date asc nulls last, d.data_id desc

select m.username as m_username, m.name as m_name, m.email as m_email, m.role as m_role, m.gym_id as m_gym_id, d.data_id, d.contract, d.status, d.start_date, d.end_date, d.issue_date from "h_member" m left join lateral ( select c.data_id, c.contract, c.status, c.start_date, c.end_date, c.issue_date from "h_contract_data" c where c.receiver_id = m.username and ((upper(m.role) = 'TRAINER' and c.contract = 2) or (upper(m.role) = 'MEMBER' and c.contract in (3, 4, 5))) order by c.data_id desc limit 1 ) d on true where m.gym_id = #{gymId, jdbcType=BIGINT} and upper(m.role) in ('TRAINER', 'MEMBER') order by upper(m.role) desc, m.username asc

select d.data_id, d.contract, d.gym_id, d.sender_id, d.receiver_id, d.receiver_name, d.status, d.previous_data_id, d.related_data_id, d.source_coupon_id, d.start_date, d.end_date, d.issue_date, d.quantity, d.manager_id, m.username as m_username, m.name as m_name, m.email as m_email, m.role as m_role, m.gym_id as m_gym_id from "h_contract_data" d left join "h_member" m on d.receiver_id = m.username where d.contract in (4, 5) and d.manager_id = #{username} order by d.end_date asc nulls last, d.data_id desc
mapper.insert: insert into "h_contract_data" (contract, gym_id, sender_id, receiver_id, receiver_name, status, start_date, end_date, amount, contract_rate, quantity, manager_id, birth_date, avg_workout_hour, avg_workout_minute, previous_data_id, related_data_id, source_coupon_id, issue_date) values (#{contract}, #{gymId, jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{senderId}, #{receiverId, jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{receiverName}, #{status}, #{startDate, jdbcType=DATE}, #{endDate, jdbcType=DATE}, #{amount, jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{contractRate, jdbcType=NUMERIC}, #{quantity, jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{managerId, jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{birthDate, jdbcType=DATE}, #{avgWorkoutHour, jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{avgWorkoutMinute, jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{previousDataId, jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{relatedDataId, jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{sourceCouponId, jdbcType=BIGINT}, current_date)
mapper.select:
select d.data_id, d.contract, d.gym_id, d.sender_id, d.receiver_id, d.receiver_name, d.status, d.previous_data_id, d.related_data_id, d.source_coupon_id, d.start_date, d.end_date, d.amount, d.contract_rate, d.quantity, d.remaining_count, d.issue_date, d.signed_at, d.manager_id, d.birth_date, d.avg_workout_hour, d.avg_workout_minute, m.username as m_username, m.name as m_name, m.email as m_email, m.role as m_role, m.gym_id as m_gym_id from "h_contract_data" d left join "h_member" m on d.receiver_id = m.username
and d.contract = 1
and ( (d.sender_id = #{contractDTO.username} and d.contract in (2, 3, 4, 5)) or (d.contract = 1 and d.receiver_id = #{contractDTO.username}) )
and ( (d.contract in (4, 5) and d.manager_id = #{contractDTO.username}) or (d.contract = 2 and d.receiver_id = #{contractDTO.username}) )
and 1 = 0
and d.contract = #{contractDTO.contract}
and (m.name like concat('%', #{contractDTO.keyword}, '%') or cast(m.username as varchar) like concat('%', #{contractDTO.keyword}, '%') or d.receiver_name like concat('%', #{contractDTO.keyword}, '%'))
order by d.issue_date desc, d.data_id desc limit #{pager.perPage} offset #{pager.offset}

select count(*) from "h_contract_data" d left join "h_member" m on d.receiver_id = m.username
and d.contract = 1
and ( (d.sender_id = #{username} and d.contract in (2, 3, 4, 5)) or (d.contract = 1 and d.receiver_id = #{username}) )
and ( (d.contract in (4, 5) and d.manager_id = #{username}) or (d.contract = 2 and d.receiver_id = #{username}) )
and 1 = 0
and d.contract = #{contract}
and (m.name like concat('%', #{keyword}, '%') or cast(m.username as varchar) like concat('%', #{keyword}, '%') or d.receiver_name like concat('%', #{keyword}, '%'))

select coalesce(count(*), 0) as "count" from "h_contract_data" d where d.gym_id = #{gymId} and d.contract in (3, 4, 5) and d.status in ('SIGNED', 'ACTIVE') and d.end_date between current_date and current_date + 30
